name: Frank Lindenberg
background: Mr. Lindenberg has served as a director since 2021. He previously served as CFO of Mercedes-Benz Cars and CFO of Daimler Trucks. He is a member of the board of directors of various private companies.

company_affiliations.name: Mercedes-Benz Group AG
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Head of Finance & Controlling / CFO (Mercedes-Benz AG)
